articles.title: Brocchi: "Today the Milan fans sang from the first to the last minute, they were fantastic"

Armand Laurienté, one goal, one assist and one red card, spoke to DAZN at the end of Sassuolo-Milan. His words:

Did you have fun?

“As always, we did well.”
